description: Set of Him and Her watchesBronze steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comforttitan logo at the 12 hour mark date aperture at the 3 hour markBlack leather strap with a tang claspBlack dial with bronze coloured handsScrew to reset timeTransparent case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters allowing you to use it even when showeringWarranty: 1 year
